Desire Paths

Place origin and destination nodes on walkable ground, then read the friction field as it forms.

1 Select a placement mode above, then click walkable ground to place an origin node
2 Switch to Destination and place a destination node on another walkable location
3 Press Simulate Flows to watch agents discover desire paths through the terrain
